compiled_state.title: Add config validation tests for debug.max_fix_validate_cycles boundary values
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add tests for edge-case values of debug.max_fix_validate_cycles config key. These tests verify the SKILL.md documents correct handling of boundary values.

**File**: `tests/scripts/test-debug-config-keys.sh` (extend the file created in task e98c-da8c)

**4 additional test functions**:
1. `test_max_cycles_zero_skips_loop` — SKILL.md documents that value=0 means skip validation loop entirely
2. `test_max_cycles_negative_defaults` — SKILL.md documents that negative values default to 3
3. `test_max_cycles_non_numeric_defaults` — SKILL.md documents that non-numeric values default to 3 with warning
4. `test_max_cycles_capped_at_10` — SKILL.md documents that values > 10 are capped at 10 with warning

**Structural test exemption**: Metadata/schema validation of config documentation in SKILL.md.
**Depends on**: Task e98c-da8c (creates the test file), Task d48d-d2bd (implements the SKILL.md changes)

### Files to modify
- EDIT: `tests/scripts/test-debug-config-keys.sh`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions in config keys test (2 original + 4 new)
  Verify: grep -c 'test_\|--- test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-config-keys.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'

comments.body: Fixed: 4 config boundary value tests (zero, negative, non-numeric, >10 cap).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
